\section{Professional Summary}
Software Development Engineer with \textbf{3 years} of experience in \textbf{Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC)}, \textbf{SOA Suite}, and \textbf{VBCS}, delivering scalable integrations, REST/SOAP APIs, and event-driven microservices architectures.
